name: Exclusion of Puerto Rican Source Income

eligibility.description: Must be a bona fide resident of Puerto Rico for the entire taxable year. Also provides a partial exclusion for the year of a move if resident for at least 2 years prior.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes income derived from sources within Puerto Rico from U.S. federal gross income for bona fide residents of Puerto Rico.
